mapper.sql: select id, device_no, station_id, rule_id, alarm_level, alarm_type, alarm_name, alarm_value, alarm_detail, phase, sb_info, alarm_time, is_handled from rules_alarm_log
mapper.insert: insert into rules_alarm_log (device_no, station_id, rule_id, alarm_level, alarm_type, alarm_name, alarm_value, alarm_detail, phase, sb_info, alarm_time, is_handled) values (#{deviceNo}, #{stationId}, #{ruleId}, #{alarmLevel}, #{alarmType}, #{alarmName}, #{alarmValue}, #{alarmDetail}, #{phase}, #{sbInfo}, #{alarmTime}, #{isHandled})
mapper.delete: delete from rules_alarm_log where id in #{id}
